verses.1: A Psalm of Asaph. God standeth in the congregation of the mighty; he judgeth among the gods.
verses.2: How long will ye judge unjustly, and accept the persons of the wicked? Selah.
verses.3: Defend the poor and fatherless: do justice to the afflicted and needy.
verses.4: Deliver the poor and needy: deliver them from the hand of the wicked.
verses.5: They know not, neither will they understand; they walk on in darkness: all the foundations of the earth are out of course.
verses.6: I have said, Ye are gods; and all of you are children of the Most High.
verses.7: But ye shall die like men, and fall like one of the princes.
verses.8: Arise, O God, judge the earth: for thou wilt inherit all nations.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
